update impacted application

verify controller capacity

records.title: Get Help command line Microsoft 365 diagnostic source

records.title: Device Manager hardware error codes
recommendedActions: Record Device Manager code and device name
Update, roll back, or reinstall driver only after confirmation
Contact hardware vendor when Microsoft guidance requires vendor support

records.title: Graphics device Code 43 driver or hardware failure
recommendedActions: Update graphics driver
Roll back recent driver when appropriate
Uninstall/reinstall device only after confirmation
Treat hardware failure as manual review

records.title: Winsock catalog corruption reset

records.title: Printer connection, recognition, and spooler troubleshooting

Restart Print Spooler only through reviewed workflow

records.title: SetupDiag Windows upgrade failure analysis

Import SetupDiag output as diagnostic-only evidence

records.title: Official DISM and SFC system file repair sequence
recommendedActions: Run DISM RestoreHealth before SFC when following official support guidance
Capture CBS.log and DISM.log
Keep RestoreHealth and SFC repair behind explicit RUN

records.title: Windows unexpected restart and stop code evidence
symptoms: blue screen or black screen failure
recommendedActions: Record stop code and faulting module
Review driver and hardware evidence before repair

records.title: Component store corruption check and repair

sfc /scannow

records.title: Windows upgrade interrupted by restart or sign-out
recommendedActions: retry upgrade
keep PC plugged in
avoid restart or sign-out during upgrade

records.title: Windows Update 0x80070002 missing or corrupt files

Validate component store before repair

records.title: Windows Update 0x80070422 service disabled or stopped

Confirm policy or enterprise management before enabling services
Use explicit RUN gate before changing service startup

records.title: Windows Update 0x80070490 driver operation failure

records.title: Windows Update file is damaged or missing

sfc /scannow

records.title: Windows Update 0x800f0823 servicing stack required
recommendedActions: Confirm CBS.log servicing stack requirement
Install required servicing stack or cumulative update path

records.title: Windows Update 0x800f0831 manifest or package corruption
recommendedActions: Inspect CBS.log for missing package identity
Use DISM/SFC only under explicit repair workflow

records.title: Windows upgrade 0xC1900101 likely driver rollback
recommendedActions: Run SetupDiag and review driver evidence
Update or remove incompatible drivers only after confirmation
Do not auto-remove drivers

records.title: Windows Update common error code map

records.title: Windows Update troubleshooter and Get Help first-line path
symptoms: Windows Update error without local evidence
recommendedActions: Use Microsoft Get Help or Windows Update troubleshooter first
Import resulting output as diagnostic evidence
Do not invent findings when no output is available
